description: Session 7 (2026-05-06) — overnight resilience pass on claude/fix-pipeline-spreadsheet-fw8mc. All fixes are additive transient-error handling + timeout= parameters. No behavior change on the success path.

fixes.title: (529, 529) duplicate tuple in carousel_reviewer storytelling scorer
fixes.what_done: carousel_reviewer.py L1050: replace (529, 529) duplicate-only tuple with (429, 503, 529) so Anthropic rate-limit and service-unavailable errors also trip the soft-warn path instead of being treated as hard errors.

fixes.title: find_supporting_clips() requesting wrong orientation
fixes.what_done: motion_sources.py L929: switched the Pexels API request from landscape to portrait. Carousels are 1080x1350 and reels are 9:16 — the previous landscape-only request meant the file selector never had portrait candidates to pick.

fixes.title: Self-heal orchestrator narrow Anthropic exception net
fixes.what_done: self_heal/orchestrator.py L1129-1140: extended Claude → OpenAI fallback to also catch RateLimitError, APIStatusError (529), APIConnectionError, APITimeoutError. Previously a 429/529/timeout crashed the whole 2-hour cycle.

fixes.title: Self-heal UNKNOWN final_outcome on retry exhaustion
fixes.what_done: self_heal/orchestrator.py L1210: when 3-attempt loop exits without a break, surface FAILED_AFTER_RETRIES with last error_log instead of leaving final_outcome='UNKNOWN' in the queue Last Result column.

fixes.title: Capture _llm_text only fell back on credit/auth
fixes.what_done: scripts/capture/capture_pipeline.py L91-115: extended _llm_text() classification to also fall back to OpenAI on RateLimitError, APIStatusError, OverloadedError, APIConnectionError, APITimeoutError, plus 429/529/overloaded string heuristics.

fixes.title: Add timeout to 12 urllib.urlopen() calls (8 files)
fixes.what_done: approval_handler.py (4 calls), image_library.py (4), email_preview.py (2), topic_picker.py (2), opc_proof_post.py (2), motion_sources.py (1), _llm_fallback.py (2), capture_pipeline.py (2): each urlopen() now has timeout= so a stalled connection cannot pin the GitHub Actions job at its 90-min job-level timeout.

fixes.title: Add timeout to 14 requests.get/put/post calls (4am_agent)
fixes.what_done: chat_log_reader.py (3 calls), pattern_learner.py (5), scraper.py (2), self_healer.py (8): same pattern as S7-FIX6 but for the requests library in the 4AM agent module. Job-level 30-min timeout no longer the only safety net.

fixes.title: Sheet auto-update infrastructure for ad-hoc fixes
fixes.what_done: Added pipeline_tracker_writer.py append-session mode + 1-line hook in pipeline_self_heal.yml's Sync tracker step. Reads .github/session_fixes/pending.json, appends rows to Master Checklist, self-renames pending.json after success (idempotent). This row was created by that mechanism.
